name: Offline C# source type-check

name: Python lock integrity
summary: 63 runtime/build packages are exactly pinned with hashes.

name: Static source validation
summary: Python syntax, JSON parsing and shell syntax passed.

name: Repository guards
summary: All available architecture, deployment, branding, secret and updater guards passed.

name: VpnAccessBot regression and lint suite
summary: Locked packages cannot be downloaded: PyPI and mirrors return HTTP 403 through the environment proxy.

name: .NET build and regression suite
summary: .NET SDK 10.0.301 is installed and matches global.json, but NuGet restore is blocked by HTTP 403 from api.nuget.org through the environment proxy; build, tests and advisory lookup therefore did not run.

name: ShellCheck and backup/restore self-test
summary: shellcheck and sqlite3 CLI are absent and cannot be installed from blocked repositories.

name: Production integrations and canary
command: Telegram Stars, Happ, upstream, DNS/TLS, systemd, backup/restore and rollback canary
summary: Requires the target host and real external providers.
